query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=collection (CollectorCreated)
| json "eventName", "collector.ephemeral" as EventName, IsEphemeral nodrop
| where EventName="CollectorCreated" AND IsEphemeral="true"
| count as Count by IsEphemeral
| fillmissing values("true") in IsEphemeral

sources.dashboardDescription: Collector Management - Overview Dashboard provides a high-level view of trends related to collector and source activities, collector upgrade requests, upgrade successes and failures, the number of ephemeral collectors created and deleted, and the number of clobber collectors that were deleted.
